home.title: AI integration and data engineering, GDPR-compliant.
home.subtitle: I help SMEs and startups transform raw data and deploy LLMs, RAG and AI agents, without sending their data outside Europe.

trustItems.title: GDPR-compliant by design
trustItems.body: EU hosting, anonymisation, data-flow audit. Your data stays where it belongs.

trustItems.title: Data engineering included
trustItems.body: SQL, DBT, transformation pipelines. I start from raw data and make it usable before AI even enters the picture.

trustItems.title: Up-to-date AI stack
trustItems.body: Frontier & open-source LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, agents. I stay actively informed.

trustItems.title: Pragmatic delivery
trustItems.body: POC in days, framed productionisation, knowledge transfer included.

about.metaDescription: 4th year engineering student at UTT, AI integration and data engineering freelancer (SQL, DBT), Pierre Kasparian.
about.heading: About
about.role: AI & Data Engineering Freelancer · Engineering student at UTT
about.introBody: 4th year computer engineering student at UTT (Université de Technologie de Troyes) and AI integration & data engineering freelancer. I transform raw data into usable pipelines (SQL, DBT) and deploy custom AI solutions for SMEs and startups, with one obsession: keeping your data in Europe and under your control.

parcourItems.title: Machine Learning & Data Science Training
parcourItems.body: ML fundamentals: regression, classification, clustering, scikit-learn, Python. Applied to stock price prediction.

parcourItems.title: LLM Engineering Training
parcourItems.body: Intensive programme : RAG, QLoRA fine-tuning, autonomous agents, deploying open-source models.

parcourItems.title: UTT - Computer Science & Information Systems
parcourItems.body: 4th year. Engineering programme, oriented towards information systems and software development and specialised in data.

roles.subtitle: AI & Data Intern
roles.body: Built data pipelines and generative AI implementations at fintech Pretto.

roles.subtitle: AI & Data Freelance
roles.body: Three months of freelance following the internship, continuing data and AI projects.

experienceItems.title: AI & Data Freelancer
experienceItems.body: Chatbot creation, machine learning, RAG, AI automation and web development. Data engineering (SQL, DBT).

roles.subtitle: Technical Director and Project Lead
roles.body: Led client projects, managed technical teams and coordinated deliverables.

roles.subtitle: Head of Communications & Events
roles.body: Managed social media, external communications and event organisation for the association.

valuesItems.title: GDPR by design
valuesItems.body: Every integration is built for compliance from day one, not bolted on at the end of the project.

valuesItems.title: Knowledge transfer
valuesItems.body: I hand over the skills. At the end of an engagement, you should be able to maintain and evolve what we built.

valuesItems.title: Pragmatism
valuesItems.body: Fast POC, short feedback loop, iterative delivery. No over-engineering.
